name: com.52choujiang/xhs-insights
title: SocialDataX 小红书 Xiaohongshu XHS RedNote MCP
description: 小红书 / Xiaohongshu / XHS / RedNote MCP for filtered note search, search hot list, details, comments, comment replies, creator profiles, creator notes, and speech-to-text transcript.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer API key from SocialDataX / 社媒数据助手

tools.name: xhs_search_notes
tools.description: Search Xiaohongshu / 小红书 notes by keyword with optional sort, note type, and publish-time filters. In every use of a returned note_url, such as final answers, display, references, storage, output, or forwarding, preserve the full URL exactly, including xsec_token; do not rebuild links from note_id.

tools.name: xhs_get_search_hot_list
tools.description: Get the Xiaohongshu / 小红书 search hot list with each item's title and heat value.

tools.name: xhs_submit_video_speech_text_by_note_url
tools.description: Submit an XHS note video speech-to-text transcript task from a note link, short link, or share text. 提交完成后最多短等 15 秒；if not finished, returns a job handle.

tools.name: xhs_submit_video_speech_text_by_note_id
tools.description: Submit an XHS note video speech-to-text transcript task from a note_id. 提交完成后最多短等 15 秒；if not finished, returns a job handle.

tools.name: xhs_get_video_speech_text_job
tools.description: Check an XHS note video speech-to-text transcript job by job_id without starting a new task. This v1 surface returns transcript only, not summary.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_detail_by_note_url
tools.description: Resolve a shared XHS link, short link, or share text into structured note details. In every use of a returned note_url, such as final answers, display, references, storage, output, or forwarding, preserve the full URL exactly, including xsec_token; do not rebuild links from note_id. If note_url is null, do not synthesize or rebuild a public link from note_id.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_detail_by_note_id
tools.description: Fetch structured note details when the caller already has a note ID. If note_url is returned, preserve the full URL exactly in every use, such as final answers, display, references, storage, output, or forwarding, including xsec_token; do not rebuild links from note_id. If note_url is null, do not synthesize or rebuild a public link from note_id.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_comments_by_note_id
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments when the caller already has a note ID. To continue pagination, pass the full returned next_page_token back unchanged as page_token; do not truncate, summarize, mask, or replace the middle with ellipses.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_comments_by_note_url
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments directly from a shared note URL, short link, or share text. To continue pagination, pass the full returned next_page_token back unchanged as page_token; do not truncate, summarize, mask, or replace the middle with ellipses.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_sub_comments_by_comment_id
tools.description: Fetch paginated replies under a first-level comment by note ID and comment ID. To continue pagination, pass the full returned next_page_token back unchanged as page_token; do not truncate, summarize, mask, or replace the middle with ellipses.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_info_by_user_id
tools.description: Fetch creator profile data when the caller already has a user ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_info_by_profile_url
tools.description: Resolve a profile link, short link, or share text into creator profile data.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_posted_notes_by_user_id
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of notes published by a creator when the caller already has a user ID. To continue pagination, pass the full returned next_page_token back unchanged as page_token; do not truncate, summarize, mask, or replace the middle with ellipses.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_posted_notes_by_profile_url
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of notes published by a creator from a profile link, short link, or share text. To continue pagination, pass the full returned next_page_token back unchanged as page_token; do not truncate, summarize, mask, or replace the middle with ellipses.
